name: code_data_protection_policy
description: Source-code exposure, API keys, private keys, credentials, env files, repo secrets.

rules.description: Secret/credential material leaving via an outbound action.
rules.reason: Secret/credential egress to an external system is blocked

rules.description: Secret material present in the payload at all.
rules.reason: Detected secret material should be redacted before the action continues
Accessing an environment/credentials file requires approval

rules.description: Source code about to leave the boundary.
rules.reason: Source code paired with an external send requires approval
